title: Geography
description: A geographic unit with its FIPS/GEOID, human-readable name, level, and optional geometry.

geoid.description: FIPS code, zero-padded to canonical length for the geo_level. Never truncate or parse as integer.

geo_level.description: Geographic level. Determines expected GEOID length and available data sources.

name.description: Human-readable name from Census TIGER or the authoritative source.

state_fips.description: 2-digit state FIPS code. Null only for national-level geographies.

county_fips.description: 5-digit county FIPS code (state + county). Null for state-level and above.

state_name.description: State name. Null for national-level geographies.

county_name.description: County name (without 'County' suffix). Null for state-level and above.

vintage.description: TIGER vintage year this geography definition is drawn from.

land_area_sqm.description: Land area in square meters (ALAND from TIGER). Null if not yet loaded.

water_area_sqm.description: Water area in square meters (AWATER from TIGER). Null if not yet loaded.

internal_point.description: Census-defined internal point (INTPTLAT/INTPTLON), guaranteed to be within the geography. GeoJSON Point.

geometry.description: GeoJSON geometry for this geography in WGS84 (EPSG:4326). May be omitted for lightweight responses.

parent_geoid.description: GEOID of the containing geography one level up. E.g., county GEOID for a tract.

population.description: Total population from the most recent Decennial Census or ACS 5-year estimate.

housing_units.description: Total housing units from the most recent Decennial Census or ACS 5-year estimate.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this geography record was first loaded.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this geography record was last updated.
